news.headline: France seizes Russia-linked oil tanker
news.summary: France's navy has intercepted a sanctioned tanker linked to the Russian oil trade in the Atlantic Ocean and ordered the vessel to head for the French mainland, in a move Russia said was illegal and bordered on "international ​piracy". news.summary: Myanmar opposition groups criticise India for hosting Min Aung Hlaing, but India says engagement is best way forward.
